title: volume mount ownership on macOS
body:
### Issue Description

When using a volume mount with a rootful podman machine, the owner of the directory is using the uid/gid of my macOS user



### Steps to reproduce the issue

example:

create a data folder from the current location and start

```bash
podman run -e ETCD_AUTO_COMPACTION_MODE=revision -e ETCD_AUTO_COMPACTION_RETENTION=1000 -e ETCD_QUOTA_BACKEND_BYTES=4294967296 -e ETCD_SNAPSHOT_COUNT=50000 -v $(pwd)/data:/etcd quay.io/coreos/etcd:v3.5.0 etcd -advertise-client-urls=http://127.0.0.1:2379/ -listen-client-urls http://0.0.0.0:2379/ --data-dir /etcd
```

(this command comes from https://milvus.io/docs/install_standalone-docker.md#Install-Milvus-standalone-using-Docker-Compose )


then if we list the folder `/etcd` inside the container by replacing the entrypoint I have:

```
$ podman run -e ETCD_AUTO_COMPACTION_MODE=revision -e ETCD_AUTO_COMPACTION_RETENTION=1000 -e ETCD_QUOTA_BACKEND_BYTES=4294967296 -e ETCD_SNAPSHOT_COUNT=50000 -v $(pwd)/data:/etcd --rm -it --entrypoint=sh quay.io/coreos/etcd:v3.5.0
# ls -la /
total 8
dr-xr-xr-x.   1 root root      29 Jan 26 18:11 .
dr-xr-xr-x.   1 root root      29 Jan 26 18:11 ..
-rwxr-xr-x.   1 root root       0 Jan 27  2021 .dockerenv
drwxr-xr-x.   2 root root    4096 Jan 27  2021 bin
drwxr-xr-x.   2 root root       6 Nov 22  2020 boot
drwxr-xr-x.   5 root root     360 Jan 26 18:11 dev
drwxr-xr-x.  25 root root    4096 Jan 27  2021 etc
drwxr-xr-x.   2  501 dialout   64 Jan 26 18:11 etcd
```

`etcd` folder is using 501/dialout which is in fact my uid/gid of my macOS user `uid=501(benoitf) gid=20(staff)`

So the startup command is failing due to invalid permissions/ownership

This is by using `podman 4.9.0/qemu`


Trying with `applehv`, it does list permissions but I can't go to the folder
```bash
podman run --entrypoint=sh -it -v $(pwd)/data:/etcd quay.io/coreos/etcd:v3.5.0
# ls -la /
total 8
dr-xr-xr-x.   1 root root   29 Jan 26 18:58 .
dr-xr-xr-x.   1 root root   29 Jan 26 18:58 ..
-rwxr-xr-x.   1 root root    0 Jan 27  2021 .dockerenv
drwxr-xr-x.   2 root root 4096 Jan 27  2021 bin
drwxr-xr-x.   2 root root    6 Nov 22  2020 boot
drwxr-xr-x.   5 root root  360 Jan 26 18:58 dev
drwxr-xr-x.  25 root root 4096 Jan 27  2021 etc
drwxr-xr-x.   3 root root   96 Jan 26 18:57 etcd

# cd /etcd
# ls -la
ls: cannot open directory '.': Permission denied
```


### Describe the results you received

Running the same command with docker I got:

```
# ls -la /
total 68
drwxr-xr-x   1 root root 4096 Jan 26 18:15 .
drwxr-xr-x   1 root root 4096 Jan 26 18:15 ..
-rwxr-xr-x   1 root root    0 Jan 26 18:15 .dockerenv
drwxr-xr-x   2 root root 4096 Jan 27  2021 bin
drwxr-xr-x   2 root root 4096 Nov 22  2020 boot
drwxr-xr-x   5 root root  360 Jan 26 18:15 dev
drwxr-xr-x   1 root root 4096 Jan 26 18:15 etc
drwxr-xr-x   2 root root   64 Jan 26 18:11 etcd

```

### Describe the results you expected

be able to start the compose file from https://milvus.io/docs/install_standalone-docker.md#Install-Milvus-standalone-using-Docker-Compose

### podman info output

```yaml
If you are unable to run podman info for any reason, please provide the podman version, operating system and its version and the architecture you are running.
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body:
In my case, the result is as follows.
```
% podman -v
podman version 4.9.0
% export CONTAINERS_MACHINE_PROVIDER=qemu
% podman machine init --now
% podman run -it -v $(pwd)/data:/etcd quay.io/coreos/etcd:v3.5.0 ls -la /
total 8
dr-xr-xr-x.   1 root   root      29 Jan 29 01:38 .
dr-xr-xr-x.   1 root   root      29 Jan 29 01:38 ..
-rwxr-xr-x.   1 root   root       0 Jan 27  2021 .dockerenv
drwxr-xr-x.   2 root   root    4096 Jan 27  2021 bin
drwxr-xr-x.   2 root   root       6 Nov 22  2020 boot
drwxr-xr-x.   5 root   root     360 Jan 29 01:38 dev
drwxr-xr-x.  25 root   root    4096 Jan 27  2021 etc
drwxr-xr-x.   2 root   nogroup   64 Jan 28 23:48 etcd
...
% podman run -u root --userns=keep-id -it -v $(pwd)/data:/etcd quay.io/coreos/etcd:v3.5.0 ls -la / 
total 4
dr-xr-xr-x.   1 root   root      40 Jan 29 01:57 .
dr-xr-xr-x.   1 root   root      40 Jan 29 01:57 ..
-rwxr-xr-x.   1 root   root       0 Jan 27  2021 .dockerenv
drwxr-xr-x.   1 root   root    4096 Jan 27  2021 bin
drwxr-xr-x.   1 root   root       6 Nov 22  2020 boot
drwxr-xr-x.   5 root   root     360 Jan 29 01:57 dev
drwxr-xr-x.   1 root   root      33 Jan 27  2021 etc
drwxr-xr-x.   2 core   nogroup   64 Jan 28 23:48 etcd
...
% podman run -u root --userns=keep-id -it -v $(pwd)/data:/etcd quay.io/coreos/etcd:v3.5.0 id core        
uid=501(core) gid=1000(core) groups=1000(core)
```

In `applehv`, fixed by https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/21297 and https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/21320 .
